title: UK REACH authorisation for SEA (Technical Consortium), 20 January 2025
body: "Decision on an application for authorisation under UK REACH.  Substance name  Chromium trioxide  Authorised use  The use of chromium trioxide for the electroplating of various components with technical performance requirements.  Holders of the authorisation and authorisation numbers  Surface Engineering Association, Technical Consortium:   Agbrigg Chrome Platers (UKREACH/25/03/00) Allenchrome Electroplating Ltd (UKREACH/25/03/01) Alpha Electroplaters Ltd (UKREACH/25/03/02) Birmingham Plating (UKREACH/25/03/03) Broadway Brass Ltd (UKREACH/25/03/04) Castle Polishing & Chrome Plating Ltd (UKREACH/25/03/05) Crown Polishing & Plating Ltd (UKREACH/25/03/06) Derby Plating Services Ltd (UKREACH/25/03/07) Doug Taylor Metal Finishing Co. (UKREACH/25/03/08) Douglas Metal Finishing Ltd (UKREACH/25/03/09) Essex Finishers Ltd (UKREACH/25/03/10) Fox Plating (UKREACH/25/03/11) Genius of the Lamp Ltd (UKREACH/25/03/12) Global Metal Finishers Ltd (UKREACH/25/03/13) HD Sports (UKREACH/25/03/14) Hockley Enterprises (Essex) Ltd (UKREACH/25/03/15) J&A Finishing Services Ltd (UKREACH/25/03/16) John Stokes Ltd (UKREACH/25/03/17) MAJ Hi-Spec Ltd (UKREACH/25/03/18) Manchester Electroplating Ltd (UKREACH/25/03/19) Marque Restore Chrome Plating Ltd (UKREACH/25/03/20) Merridale Polishing & Plating Ltd (UKREACH/25/03/21) Midland Polishing & Plating (UKREACH/25/03/22) Prestige Electro Plating (UKREACH/25/03/23) Quality Chrome Ltd (UKREACH/25/03/24) Reeve Metal Finishing (UKREACH/25/03/25) S&T Electro-plate (UKREACH/25/03/26) Sant Plating Ltd (UKREACH/25/03/27) Silchrome Plating Ltd (UKREACH/25/03/28) Star Polishing & Plating Ltd (UKREACH/25/03/29) The Sterlingham Co Ltd (UKREACH/25/03/30) Satchrome (UKREACH/25/03/31) Vernon Moss (UKREACH/25/03/32) Vintage Headlamp Restoration Ltd (UKREACH/25/03/33)   Date of decision  20 January 2025 "
